title: Look to the Stars
description: A space-focused QoL multiplayer (or singleplayer) modpack that focuses on mods like Ad Astra and Spyglass Astronomy to create a fun and enjoyable adventure with friends.
body:
# Look to the Stars A QoL multiplayer (or singleplayer) modpack that focuses on mods like **_Ad Astra_** and **_Spyglass Astronomy_** to create a fun, enjoyable, and space-focused adventure with friends. This modpack aims to do most of the heavy lifting for you, giving you a starter kit and peppering the world with structures. Vein Mine is enabled by default, and mining trees is easy, too - just crouch to mine a whole tree at once. Campfires are very beneficial as they reduce spawns, provide regeneration, and even burn hostile mobs if they get close! Enjoy stargazing and good luck on your journey to outer space! # Content This contains a decent amount of mods that do random stuff, including but not limited to:
Mod list - Camps. Castles. Carriages. - This adds a lot of cool structures to the game! - Custom Portals - Create nether-like portals anywhere and connect them together! - Life Crystals - This way you won't die immediately in outer space or elsewhere! - Gravestones - Store your items conveniently in case you do die. - Friends&Foes - Added all those mob vote mobs that didn't make it in :( - Exposure - A very cool camera mod that adds literal cameras to the game! - Hearth & Home - Adds a wide assortment of furniture. - Mob Catalog - Adds capybaras!!! - Lots more!
The goal of those all is to make this pack immersive but also light-hearted and something to not have to sink a ton of time to, **but** also interesting enough to keep _wanting_ to come back. So I lessened the grind as much as I could while still making every effort worth it. # Credit(s) Icon photo by Jeremy Thomas on Unsplash # Contact me This is my first modpack and I don't have any public-facing accounts, so if you have any suggestions or issues, I created a [discord server](https://discord.gg/fXuDqeHJ). Feel free to join and reach out!
